name: Inaba Foods Cat Treat Grilled Chicken Fillet Extra Tender In Crab Flavored Broth
description: Gyour cat to the irresistible taste of Inaba Grilled Chicken Fillet in Crab Flavored Broth — a premium, hand-cut chicken treat crafted from wholesome, high-quality ingredients. Made with farm-raised chicken and packed in a savory crab-flavored broth, each tender fillet delivers delicious flavor while helping keep your feline hydrated. This lightly grilled, flaky chicken treat is vacuum-sealed in UV-blocking packaging to preserve freshness and nutrients. Free from grains, preservatives, and artificial colors, it’s enriched with Vitamin E to support immunity and Green Tea Extract for antioxidant protection. Perfect for bonding moments, you can hand-feed these tender fillets, serve them as a topper, or offer them as a special reward. Suitable for cats of all life stages, this treat adds variety and excitement to your cat’s daily routine. Key Benefits . Made with farm-raised chicken & natural crab-flavored broth . Helps support hydration with moisture-rich broth . Grain-free & free from artificial colors and preservatives . Enriched with Vitamin E & Green Tea Extract antioxidants . Hand-feed, topper, or treat for interactive bonding . Vacuum-sealed freshness with UV-blocking packaging . Suitable for kittens, adults & senior cats Ingredients Chicken, Natural Crab Flavored Broth, Tapioca, Collagen, Guar Gum, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 18.0% Crude Fat (min): 0.8% Crude Fiber (max): 0.5% Moisture (max): 75.0% Vitamin E (min): 18 IU/kg Calories: 1118 kcal/kg, 28 kcal per piece Net Weight: 0.9 oz (per fillet) Feeding Guide Feed as a treat only, not as a complete meal. Provide fresh drinking water daily. Storage Refrigerate after opening and serve promptly for freshness.
